raw_source.title: 深圳] 合规上市交易所 Java开发职位（现场办公）50-70K RMB月薪
raw_source.body:
上市合规交易所
Java开发岗位
币圈经验优先
Responsibilities
Develop and implement new features based on product requirements, ensuring high-quality code and adherence to best practices
Write efficient, maintainable, and well-documented code, adhering to coding standards
Complete system and database design in alignment with company standards
Write relevant technical documentation as required
Troubleshoot and resolve complex issues that arise within projects, focusing on system performance optimization
Regularly summarize and share experiences and results gained from work
Maintain effective communication and collaboration with team members
Qualifications
7+ years of experience in software development
Proficient in Java programming, with a good understanding of JVM principles; experience in JVM performance tuning is a plus
Familiarity with popular open-source frameworks, such as Spring Boot, MyBatis, Spring Cloud, and Dubbo
Knowledge of database design and development, with proficiency in MySQL and strong SQL writing and optimization skills
Experience in the finance sector or with large internet companies is highly preferred
Proficiency in English and Mandarin is a must
深圳现场办公

- 工作地点：深圳现场办公
- 联系方式：Wechat：zy62546760  TG：@henghengjijiji   邮箱：695721136@qq.com

##工作性质
- 是否全职：全职
- 是否远程：非远程现场办公
- 时区要求：（GMT+8优先，可覆盖核心工作时间，可适应国际分布式团队协作）
  北京时间

薪资50-70K RMB 月薪
raw_source.author: a695721136-dev
